{"problem_standardized_math":"Let \(x^{(0)}=-2\), \(s_1^{(0)}=1\), \(s_2^{(0)}=1\), \(z_1^{(0)}=z_2^{(0)}=1\), and \(\mu=0\). Compute the full Newton step for the system in part (a). Truncate the step, if necessary, to satisfy the fraction-to-the-boundary rule with \(\tau=1\). Verify that the new iterate remains in the region \(\{(x,s_1,s_2): x^2-s_1-1\ge 0,\ s_1\ge 0\}\) given in \((19.54)\)."}
